div.font:
STUDIO INTERFACES
User interfaces and their plugins and extensions. White-label / branding, localization, color themes
Machine interfaces - REST API, MCP,
data export/import

scripts. Heavily re-using existing Constructor Insight connectors

div.font:
Capabilities:
- Cloud, on-prem, end-user deployments
- Multi-tenant, multi-user
- Granular access control
- Scalable
- Developed on Gears (Rust)
Logical planes:
1. Control plane - projects, people, workspaces
2. Knowledge plane - SDLC artfiacts, traceability
3. Execution plane - workflows, agents, etc
